red_baseline.reason: T027 isolates canonical digest, four-location observation, current-path preference, and divergent preservation to T028.
red_baseline.summary: 1/9 passes; eight T028-owned compatibility and installer gaps remain.

validation.summary: 9/9 pass after replacing locale-sensitive path ordering with explicit canonical string comparison and rerunning the original matrix.

validation.command: node --test --test-concurrency=1 <agent installer + CLI schema v1 + compatibility + T027 tests>
validation.summary: 24/24 focused compatibility and consumer regressions pass.

validation.command: npm run check; git diff --check; node --test --test-concurrency=1 <final installer regressions>
validation.summary: Syntax passes for 102 files, whitespace validation is clean, and 16/16 final installer tests pass.

review.evidence: Manifest hashing is deterministic and symlink rejecting; doctor is read-only; default Codex install scans current/legacy/project/Plugin observations and refuses divergent/invalid content before mkdir/copy. Explicit target force compatibility remains scoped to an explicitly selected destination.

obligation_evidence.evidence: CLI schemaVersion 1 regressions remain unchanged while installer diagnostics add fields within existing payloads.
All copies are compared against one canonical Skill content manifest.
Plugin copies are observation-only; diagnosis and install never mutate Plugin or shared state.
Invalid/divergent component observations become write-blocking diagnostics.
Each observation carries kind, host, path, digest, relation, and code without treating path as trust.
Before/after snapshots prove doctor/install refusal preserve every observed tree.
Current, legacy, project, and Plugin copies are grouped; identical precedence is current-first and divergence has no winner.
Sorted normalized paths and per-file SHA-256 values produce one canonical content digest; symlinks are refused.

recovery: The first implementation run exposed locale-sensitive manifest path ordering. Canonical code-point comparison replaced localeCompare, and the original matrix plus all planned focused validations passed afterward.
